macro.title: Construction pros see spring rebound despite economic uncertainty
macro.what: Houzz Q2 2026 barometer shows construction expectations at 58, backlogs at 5.6 weeks, and clients delaying projects amid Iran war risk.
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: San Francisco Home Prices Jump Most in 8 Years Amid AI Boom
macro.what: The median sale price in the Bay Area metro rose 14% year over year in March, compared with a 1% gain nationwide
macro.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
macro.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: When listings lie: AI staging pushes real estate into an ethics gray zone
housing.what: Experts speak on best practices for agents to avoid listings that a buyer could perceive to be misleading or unrealistic.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Foreclosure filings accelerate in early 2026 as servicer pressure builds
housing.what: Foreclosure activity accelerated in the first quarter of 2026, with signs of mounting operational pressure for mortgage servicers and downstream vendors.
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Down payments and private listings, not commissions, remain buyers’ biggest hurdles
housing.what: Survey of 223 counselors finds 7% saw lower commissions post NAR settlement, while 46% say pocket listings create access hurdles.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.
